title: Urban Living Liberty Trolley 4 Levels 46.5 x 26 x 78.8 cm Midnight Blue
features: No need to worry about limited kitchen space. Made out of hard plastic is this 3/4 tier kitchen storage trolley built with open square structure baskets and rolling wheel base perfect for storing everyday kitchen essentials like vegetables, fruits, kitchen ingredients or even cook books!

This Plastic Trolley on Wheels is available in 2 DIFFERENT TIERS – 3 Tier (H: 59cm x L: 46.5cm x W: 26cm) and 4 Tier (H: 79cm x L: 46.5cm x W: 26cm). In both tiers it is available in 3 DIFERENT COLOURS – Dark Grey, Taupe and Yellow. THIS TROLLEY WILL REQUIRE ASSEMBLING. NOTE – ONLY ONE OF YOUR CHOSEN TIER AND COLOUR WILL BE SENT OUT.

KITCHEN STORAGE TROLLEY - A trolley with countless uses and a lot of space allows you to store all your kitchen ingredients in one place, so you never have to look for them. With its compact standing structure and open nature, everyday kitchen essentials are easily accessible and easy to find as it doesn't take up a lot of space.

PRACTICAL STORAGE ACCESORY – Make your basic kitchen pop with a splash of colour. Complementing your kitchen or maintaining organisation, it is a practical storage accessory. If not using for the kitchen, this storage cart is a multifunctional tool that you could also use for the bathroom, bedroom, laundry, utility rooms, office and more.

DURABLE PLASTIC BUILD & WHEELS – Kitchen trolley made of sturdy plastic that can withstand repeated use while protecting it from common damage such as scratches/cracks/stains. The basket trolley also has sturdy plastic wheels that allow you to move it around easily making it a long lasting kitchen tool.
description: Product Description Urban Living, A recognized brand in the United States, is proud to offer its kitchen storage containers on Amazon France. These containers are designed to bring a touch of elegance and efficiency to your culinary space. They are a reflection of exceptional quality, unparalleled style and flawless reliability. Each box is made with the utmost care and attention to detail, ensuring exceptional durability and strength. The sleek and modern design of the Urban Living canisters fits perfectly with any kitchen style, adding a touch of elegance to your space. Safety Warning Make sure all parts are properly secured before use. Do not let children play on, with or near the car.
